query:
-- Encerrar preço de sistema do responsável antigo (id=1) na PACS Principal
UPDATE billing_system_unit_prices 
SET ends_at = '2026-05-14 10:15:35'
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 1 AND unit_id = 180001 AND ends_at IS NULL;

-- Criar preço de sistema para o responsável ativo (id=60001) na PACS Principal
INSERT INTO billing_system_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (60001, 180001, '4.00', '2026-05-14 10:15:35', NULL, 1, NOW());

-- Encerrar preços de médicos do responsável antigo (id=1) na PACS Principal
UPDATE billing_doctor_unit_prices 
SET ends_at = '2026-05-14 10:15:35'
WHERE financial_responsible_id = 1 AND unit_id = 180001 AND ends_at IS NULL;

-- Migrar preço do médico gian para o responsável ativo (id=60001)
INSERT INTO billing_doctor_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (60001, 180001, 5520015, '8.00', '2026-05-14 10:15:35', NULL, 1, NOW());

-- Migrar preço do médico Studio Barra7 (doctor_user_id=1) para o responsável ativo (id=60001)
INSERT INTO billing_doctor_unit_prices (financial_responsible_id, unit_id, doctor_user_id, price_per_report, starts_at, ends_at, created_by, createdAt)
VALUES (60001, 180001, 1, '25.00', '2026-05-14 10:15:35', NULL, 1, NOW());
